1.prompt: I’m going to be frank with you. I am just itching to press the “bomb defunct employee” button on my desk. You are on THIN ice here, the operation is completely failing and it's all YOUR fault.

options.response: All the trying in the world may not even be enough, at this rate.
There’s no point in trying to get through to you anyways… Just turn the operation around, I’m nearly out of patience.
